channel.title: WNwildNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from WNwildNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amateur Breeders Develop Egg-Sized Miniature Watermelons with Full Flavor
item.description: Two hobbyist breeders in Northern Virginia have cultivated a miniature watermelon variety that maintains its sweetness and flavor despite its significantly reduced size.

item.title: Mystery of Golden Object Found on Ocean Floor Finally Explained
Startup Uses Sound Waves to Extinguish Fires Without Water or Chemicals
item.description: Sonic Fire Tech is developing a fire suppression system that uses low-frequency sound waves, eliminating the need for water or chemical agents in firefighting.

item.title: French Weather Agency Suspects Sensor Tampering Tied to Polymarket Bets
item.description: France's national weather service believes temperature sensors may have been deliberately manipulated to produce irregular readings that benefited prediction market gamblers.
